title: Rubacer parviflorum
taxonomy: Rubacer parviflorum is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant belongs to the genus Rubacer and is classified as a perennial. Within the family Rosaceae, it is a member of the subfamily Rosoideae. The plant is also sometimes referred to by its synonym, Rubus parviflorus.
